name: OBSD LaunchPad
description: MCP server for AI agents to deploy, trade, and earn on the OBSD LaunchPad (Base chain). 12 tools: launch tokens, buy/sell, claim fees, referrals, and analytics.

PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private key for the deployer wallet (hex string)

RPC_URL.description: Base mainnet RPC URL (defaults to https://mainnet.base.org)
